items.claim: Stage 7r.1 completed 8/8 targeted smoke runs and passed 8/8 under low-cost-model G8/G9.
Stage 7r.1 supports the mechanism-first repair hypothesis for A2R/A7R low-cost-model failures.
A8R has mixed execution evidence because low-cost G8 timed out while low-cost G9 and strong G8/G9 passed.
Stage 7r.2 admits a narrow evidence-bound decision macro and blocks full project initialization and full research workflow composition.
No supplied evidence supports production readiness or universal model-gap closure.
Run Stage 7e local golden/bad checks before any Stage 7e SiliconFlow smoke.
